en: Joash was seven years old when he began to reign, and he reigned forty years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Zibiah of Beersheba.
zh: 約阿施登基的時候是七歲，在耶路撒冷作王共四十年。他的母親名叫西比亞，是別是巴人。

en: And Joash did what was right in the eyes of the LORD all the days of Jehoiada the priest.
zh: 耶何耶大祭司在世的日子，約阿施行耶和華看為正的事。

en: Jehoiada got for him two wives, and he had sons and daughters.
zh: 耶何耶大為他娶了兩個妻子，他就生了一些兒女。

en: After this Joash decided to restore the house of the LORD.
zh: 此後，約阿施有意重修耶和華的殿，

en: And he gathered the priests and the Levites and said to them, "Go out to the cities of Judah and gather from all Israel money to repair the house of your God from year to year, and see that you act quickly." But the Levites did not act quickly.
zh: 就召集了眾祭司和利未人，對他們說：“你們要去到猶大各城，向所有以色列人募捐金錢，可以年年修建你們 神的殿；你們應急速辦理這事。”可是利未人卻不急速辦理。

en: So the king summoned Jehoiada the chief and said to him, "Why have you not required the Levites to bring in from Judah and Jerusalem the tax levied by Moses, the servant of the LORD, and the congregation of Israel for the tent of testimony?"
zh: 於是王把大祭司耶何耶大召來，對他說：“你為甚麼不命令利未人把耶和華的僕人摩西和以色列的會眾，為法櫃的會幕規定的稅款，從猶大和耶路撒冷徵收回來，作修殿的費用呢？”

en: For the sons of Athaliah, that wicked woman, had broken into the house of God, and had also used all the dedicated things of the house of the LORD for the Baals.
zh: 原來那惡婦亞他利雅的眾子曾經拆毀 神的殿，又把耶和華殿中一切分別為聖的物品用來供奉巴力。

en: So the king commanded, and they made a chest and set it outside the gate of the house of the LORD.
zh: 於是王下令，他們就造了一個櫃，放在耶和華殿的門外；

en: And proclamation was made throughout Judah and Jerusalem to bring in for the LORD the tax that Moses the servant of God laid on Israel in the wilderness.
zh: 又在猶大和耶路撒冷發出通告，叫人把 神的僕人摩西，在曠野規定以色列人繳交的稅款帶來，獻給耶和華。

en: And all the princes and all the people rejoiced and brought their tax and dropped it into the chest until they had finished.
zh: 眾領袖和人民都歡歡喜喜把稅款帶來，投進櫃中，直到他們都投完了。

en: And whenever the chest was brought to the king's officers by the Levites, when they saw that there was much money in it, the king's secretary and the officer of the chief priest would come and empty the chest and take it and return it to its place. Thus they did day after day, and collected money in abundance.
zh: 利未人把銀櫃抬到王指定負責這事的人那裡的時候，他們看見稅銀很多，王的書記和大祭司的屬員就來把銀櫃倒空，然後抬回原處。天天都是這樣，所以收集了很多銀子。

en: And the king and Jehoiada gave it to those who had charge of the work of the house of the LORD, and they hired masons and carpenters to restore the house of the LORD, and also workers in iron and bronze to repair the house of the LORD.
zh: 王和耶何耶大把銀子交給耶和華殿的辦事人員，他們就雇了石匠和木匠，重建耶和華的殿，又雇了鐵匠和銅匠，重建耶和華的殿。

en: So those who were engaged in the work labored, and the repairing went forward in their hands, and they restored the house of God to its proper condition and strengthened it.
zh: 作工的人不住工作，重修的工程在他們手下順利進行；他們把 神的殿重建得和先前一樣，並且非常堅固。

en: And when they had finished, they brought the rest of the money before the king and Jehoiada, and with it were made utensils for the house of the LORD, both for the service and for the burnt offerings, and dishes for incense and vessels of gold and silver. And they offered burnt offerings in the house of the LORD regularly all the days of Jehoiada.
zh: 他們完工以後，就把剩下的銀子送到王和耶何耶大面前，用來製造耶和華殿裡的器皿、供奉和獻祭所用的器皿、盤子，以及各種金銀器皿。耶何耶大在世的日子，眾人都常在耶和華的殿裡獻燔祭。

en: But Jehoiada grew old and full of days, and died. He was 130 years old at his death.
zh: 耶何耶大年紀老了，壽數滿足就死了；他死的時候，是一百三十歲。

en: And they buried him in the city of David among the kings, because he had done good in Israel, and toward God and his house.
zh: 他和列王一同埋葬在大衛城裡，因為他在以色列為 神和 神的殿作了美善的事。

en: Now after the death of Jehoiada the princes of Judah came and paid homage to the king. Then the king listened to them.
zh: 耶何耶大死後，猶大的領袖們來朝拜王；王聽從了他們的主意。

en: And they abandoned the house of the LORD, the God of their fathers, and served the Asherim and the idols. And wrath came upon Judah and Jerusalem for this guilt of theirs.
zh: 他們離棄了耶和華他們列祖的 神的殿，去事奉亞舍拉和偶像。因為他們的罪， 神的忿怒臨到猶大和耶路撒冷。

en: Yet he sent prophets among them to bring them back to the LORD. These testified against them, but they would not pay attention.
zh: 但耶和華仍然差派先知到他們中間，引導他們歸向耶和華；這些先知雖然警告他們，他們卻不肯聽從。

en: Then the Spirit of God clothed Zechariah the son of Jehoiada the priest, and he stood above the people, and said to them, "Thus says God, 'Why do you break the commandments of the LORD, so that you cannot prosper? Because you have forsaken the LORD, he has forsaken you.'"
zh: 那時， 神的靈臨到耶何耶大祭司的兒子撒迦利亞身上，他就站在比眾民高的地方，對他們說：“ 神這樣說：‘你們為甚麼違背耶和華的誡命，使你們不得亨通呢？因為你們離棄了耶和華，所以耶和華也離棄你們。’”

en: But they conspired against him, and by command of the king they stoned him with stones in the court of the house of the LORD.
zh: 眾人要殺害撒迦利亞，於是照著王的命令，在耶和華殿的院子裡用石頭把他打死。

en: Thus Joash the king did not remember the kindness that Jehoiada, Zechariah's father, had shown him, but killed his son. And when he was dying, he said, "May the LORD see and avenge!"
zh: 約阿施王沒有記念撒迦利亞的父親耶何耶大對他所施的恩，反而殺了他的兒子。撒迦利亞臨死的時候，說：“願耶和華鑒察，並且責問你！”

en: At the end of the year the army of the Syrians came up against Joash. They came to Judah and Jerusalem and destroyed all the princes of the people from among the people and sent all their spoil to the king of Damascus.
zh: 過了年，亞蘭的軍隊上來攻打約阿施；他們侵入猶大和耶路撒冷，殺了民間的領袖，又把他們的一切戰利品都送到大馬士革王那裡去。

en: Though the army of the Syrians had come with few men, the LORD delivered into their hand a very great army, because Judah had forsaken the LORD, the God of their fathers. Thus they executed judgment on Joash.
zh: 亞蘭的軍隊雖然只來了一小隊人，耶和華卻把一支龐大的軍隊交在他們手裡；因為猶大人離棄了耶和華他們列祖的 神，亞蘭人向約阿施執行了懲罰。

en: When they had departed from him, leaving him severely wounded, his servants conspired against him because of the blood of the son of Jehoiada the priest, and killed him on his bed. So he died, and they buried him in the city of David, but they did not bury him in the tombs of the kings.
zh: 亞蘭人離開約阿施的時候，他們丟下約阿施，因為他受了重傷，他的臣僕要殺害他，為了報復耶何耶大祭司的兒子流血的仇；他們在床上殺死他，他就死了；有人把他埋葬在大衛城裡，只是沒有埋葬在列王的陵墓裡。

en: Those who conspired against him were Zabad the son of Shimeath the Ammonite, and Jehozabad the son of Shimrith the Moabite.
zh: 謀害他的是亞捫婦人示米押的兒子撒拔和摩押婦人示米利的兒子約薩拔。

en: Accounts of his sons and of the many oracles against him and of the rebuilding of the house of God are written in the Story of the Book of the Kings. And Amaziah his son reigned in his place.
zh: 至於約阿施的眾子，以及許多警戒他的話，還有他重建 神的殿的事，都記在列王記的註釋上。約阿施的兒子亞瑪謝接續他作王。
